nasb.text: He overlaid the boards with gold and made their rings of gold as holders for the bars, and overlaid the bars with gold.

esv.text: And he overlaid the frames with gold, and made their rings of gold for holders for the bars, and overlaid the bars with gold.

cnv.text: 他用金子把板包裹，也做了板上的金環，用作穿橫閂的地方，並且也用金子把橫閂包裹。

ccb.text: 所有的木板和横闩都包上金，并在木板上造金环，用来穿横闩。
